title: Head of Human Resource & Administration (Community, HR Strategy, HR Function)
description:
Job Responsibilities:

  • Develop and execute HR strategies aligned with business objectives to drive a high-performance culture, employee engagement, and talent retention.

  • Oversee the full spectrum of HR functions, including recruitment, compensation & benefits, performance management, employee relations, and learning & development.

  • Lead the development and implementation of HR policies and procedures, ensuring compliance with employment laws, best practices, and union requirements.

  • Partner with Management and Department Heads on workforce planning, employer branding, and HR & administrative budgeting.

  • Manage complex HR matters, including grievances, disciplinary actions, union relations, and Collective Agreement negotiations.

  • Oversee HR analytics, reporting, and administrative functions, including facilities, vendors, contracts, and continuous improvement initiatives.     

Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor's Degree in Human Resources Management, Business Administration, or a related field with a minimum of 8 years’ experience.

  • Proven experience in a similar leadership role, with a strong understanding of local labour laws, employment regulations, and HR best practices.

  • Demonstrated ability to develop and implement HR strategies that support the company’s objectives.

HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, kindly send your resume in MS WORD format or please click on “Apply Now”.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.

Trust Recruit Pte Ltd

postedCompany.description:
Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
postedCompany.name: TRUST RECRUIT PTE. LTD.
